hero.name: Adil Tirur
hero.name_note: // full name: Adil Chakkala Paramba — Tirur is where I'm from, and it just stuck.
hero.subtitle: Building robust mobile experiences from architecture to delivery. Flutter enthusiast. Robotics grad. Certified scuba diver.

about.heading: A bit about me
about.p1: I'm a Technical Lead for Mobile Apps at SHL Telemedizin GmbH in Munich, and the Founder of GradSprint LLP. My day-to-day lives at the intersection of clean architecture, mobile engineering, and building products that genuinely improve people's lives — currently in the digital health space.
about.p2: Here's the twist: I actually have an academic degree in Robotics. Somehow I ended up deep in mobile development and never looked back — turns out a robot's loss is Flutter's gain. I love the craft of writing clean, maintainable code and I'm particularly passionate about Flutter & Dart, which I've been working with since its early days.
about.p3: Outside of work, I'm slowly navigating Europe one trip at a time, and I'm a certified scuba diver — because apparently exploring the depths of the ocean and the depths of a codebase are the same kind of fun.

oss.heading: Packages & writing
oss.intro: I publish Flutter and Dart packages on pub.dev and share mobile engineering insights on Medium. More packages coming — the goal is definitely packages (plural).

cards.title: Medium — mobile development articles
cards.desc: Insights and learnings from building mobile apps.

oss.license_note: All open source work is provided under the MIT License. See Terms & Privacy for full details.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.body: Whether it's a project, a role, a collaboration on Flutter packages, or just a chat about mobile engineering — my inbox is open.

meta.title: Terms & Privacy — adiltirur.dev
meta.description: Terms of Use and Privacy Policy for adiltirur.dev, open source packages, and bots published by Adil Chakkala Paramba.

legal.heading: Terms of Use & Privacy Policy
legal.intro: Last updated: March 2026. These terms apply to adiltirur.dev, all open source packages, bots, and other software published by Adil Chakkala Paramba.

terms.label: 01 // terms of use
terms.heading: Terms of Use
terms.callout: Plain English: This website is a personal portfolio. All software I publish is offered in good faith. Use it, build with it — but don't hold me responsible if something goes wrong.
terms.permitted_p: You may use this Website and associated software for lawful purposes only. You agree not to use them in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations, infringes the rights of others, or could harm, disable, or overburden any system or service.
terms.ip_p: The content on this Website — including text, design, and code — is owned by me unless otherwise stated. Open source packages are separately licensed under their respective licenses (typically MIT). See the individual repository for the applicable license.
terms.warranty_p: This Website and all associated software are provided "as is" and "as available", without warranty of any kind, express or implied. I make no guarantees regarding accuracy, reliability, availability, or fitness for a particular purpose.
terms.liability_p: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, I shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or in connection with your use of this Website or any software I publish — even if I have been advised of the possibility of such damages.
terms.links_p: This Website contains links to external sites (GitHub, LinkedIn, Medium, pub.dev, etc.). I have no control over the content or practices of those sites and accept no responsibility for them.
terms.changes_p: I may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Website or software after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms. The "last updated" date at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision.
terms.intro_p: By accessing or using adiltirur.dev (the "Website") or any software, packages, bots, or tools published by Adil Chakkala Paramba ("I", "me", "my"), you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use the Website or any of the associated software.

oss.label: 02 // open source
oss.heading: Open Source Software Disclaimer
oss.callout: Important: All open source software I publish is provided with no guarantees. Use at your own risk. I am not liable for any damage, data loss, or other issues resulting from its use in any environment.
oss.intro_p: All packages published on pub.dev and repositories on GitHub are released under the MIT License unless a specific repository states otherwise.
oss.summary_p: The MIT License permits you to:
summary_li: Use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, or sell copies of the software
Use the software in personal, commercial, or open source projects
conditions_li: The above copyright notice and this permission notice must be included in all copies or substantial portions of the software
oss.disclaimer_p: THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.
oss.versioning_p: I maintain open source packages on a best-effort basis. There is no guarantee of bug fixes, security patches, or continued development on any particular timeline. You are encouraged to pin specific versions in production use and to evaluate any package before integrating it into critical systems.
oss.security_p: If you discover a security vulnerability in any of my open source packages, please disclose it responsibly by emailing adiltirur@gmail.com before making it public. I will make every reasonable effort to address critical issues promptly.

bots.label: 03 // bots & automated tools
bots.heading: Bots & Automated Tools
bots.callout: No responsibility: Bots and automated tools I publish are provided strictly as-is. I accept no liability for any actions taken by or with these tools, including but not limited to messages sent, data processed, or integrations triggered.
bots.intro_p: Any bots, automation scripts, or integrations (including but not limited to Microsoft Teams bots, Slack apps, or other messaging platform integrations) published under my name or by adiltirur.dev are independent software projects provided without warranty.
user_li: How you configure, deploy, and use any bot or automated tool I publish
Ensuring your deployment complies with the terms of service of the platform you are running it on (e.g., Microsoft Teams, Slack)
Any messages sent, data transmitted, or actions triggered by the bot in your environment
Securing access credentials, API keys, and tokens used by the bot
Obtaining any necessary consents from end users who interact with the bot
bots.data_p: Any bot I publish does not intentionally collect, store, or transmit personal user data unless explicitly documented in that project's README. You should review the source code of any bot before deployment to understand its data handling behaviour. I am not responsible for how you configure data storage or logging in your own deployment.
bots.platform_p: It is your responsibility to ensure that the bot complies with all applicable policies of the platform on which it is deployed, including Microsoft's Bot Framework policies, Teams App policies, or equivalent. I make no representations that any bot will meet these requirements in your specific use case.
bots.support_p: Support for bots and automated tools is provided on a best-effort, voluntary basis. There is no SLA, no guaranteed response time, and no obligation to maintain compatibility with future platform updates.

privacy.label: 04 // privacy policy
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_p: Your privacy matters to me. This policy explains what data, if any, is collected when you visit adiltirur.dev or use software I publish.
privacy.website_p1: This is a static personal website. I do not operate any servers that collect or store personal data. I do not run analytics, tracking pixels, or advertising scripts on this site.
privacy.website_p2: If you contact me via email at adiltirur@gmail.com, the content of your message is handled by Google (Gmail) and subject to Google's Privacy Policy.
privacy.website_p3: Links to third-party sites (GitHub, LinkedIn, Medium, pub.dev) are governed by their respective privacy policies. I have no control over data collected by these platforms.
privacy.packages_p: My pub.dev packages and GitHub repositories do not, by design, collect any personal data. If a package interacts with network services, this will be clearly documented. You should audit any third-party package — including mine — before use in a production environment.
privacy.bots_p: Any bot I publish does not intentionally send data to external servers unless explicitly stated in the project documentation. You, as the operator deploying the bot, are the data controller for any data processed in your environment. I am not a data processor or sub-processor in your deployment.
privacy.cookies_p: adiltirur.dev does not use cookies or any form of local storage for tracking purposes.
privacy.children_p: This Website and associated software are not directed at children under the age of 13. I do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.changes_p: I may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The "last updated" date at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision. Continued use of the Website after changes are posted constitutes acknowledgement of the updated policy.
privacy.law_p: These Terms and this Privacy Policy are governed by the laws of Germany, without regard to conflict-of-law principles. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Munich, Germany.

contact.label: 05 // contact
contact.heading: Questions?
contact.intro_p: If you have any questions about these Terms or this Privacy Policy, or to report a security issue, please contact me at:

website.label: 01 // this website

website.p1: adiltirur.dev is a static personal portfolio site. I do not operate any servers that collect or store personal data. I do not run analytics scripts, tracking pixels, or advertising of any kind on this site.
website.p2: If you contact me via email at adiltirur@gmail.com, your message is handled by Google (Gmail) and is subject to Google's Privacy Policy.
website.p3: Links to third-party platforms (GitHub, LinkedIn, Medium, pub.dev) are governed by their respective privacy policies. I have no control over data those platforms collect.

packages.label: 02 // open source packages
packages.heading: Open Source Packages
packages.p1: Packages published on pub.dev and repositories on GitHub do not, by design, collect any personal data.
packages.p2: If a package makes network requests or interacts with external services, this will be clearly documented in that package's README and changelog. You should audit any third-party package — including mine — before deploying it in a production environment that handles personal data.

bots.label: 03 // bots & automated tools
bots.heading: Bots & Automated Tools
bots.p1: Any bot or automated tool I publish (including but not limited to Microsoft Teams bots and messaging platform integrations) does not intentionally send data to external servers unless explicitly stated in that project's documentation.
bots.p2: You, as the operator deploying the bot, are the data controller for any data processed in your environment. I am not a data processor or sub-processor in your deployment. It is your responsibility to ensure compliance with applicable data protection laws (e.g., GDPR) for any personal data that flows through a bot you deploy.
bots.p3: Please review the source code of any bot before deployment to fully understand its data handling behaviour.

cookies.label: 04 // cookies
cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.p1: adiltirur.dev does not use cookies, local storage, or any other form of client-side tracking technology.

children.label: 05 // children's privacy
children.heading: Children's Privacy
children.p1: This Website and associated software are not directed at children under the age of 13. I do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided personal information in connection with this site or my software, please contact me and I will take steps to delete it.
